discussion_comments.comment_body:
which one is default?
JSDoc says that both are.

according to the implementation below

```suggestion
   * - `"draft-2020-12"` — Default. JSON Schema Draft 2020-12
   * - `"draft-7"` — JSON Schema Draft 7 */
  target?: "draft-7" | "draft-2020-12";
```

this option has default value according to the implementation below

```suggestion
  /** A registry used to look up metadata for each schema. Any schema with an `id` property will be extracted as a $def.
   * @default globalRegistry */
```

This (and `base64url()`) above could use a comment. If you haven't heard of `base64url` before, you might assume this is some sort of URL (e.g. `data:base64,abc`) rather than a text encoding of binary data.
Do you *really* mean to use `{}`? Should add an explanation for any ignores.
